tree.name: Jase Richardson
tree.tradeDescription: Drafted #25 overall by Orlando using Denver's 2025 1st round pick (top-5 protected) obtained in Aaron Gordon trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick via DEN
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Orlando traded Aaron Gordon and Gary Clark to Denver for R.J. Hampton, Gary Harris and 2025 1st round pick (DEN own, top-5 protected, conveys to 2026/2027 with same protection). Denver and Orlando also received trade exceptions

assetsGivenUp.name: Aaron Gordon
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted #4 overall by Orlando in the 2014 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: Gary Clark
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Signed rest-of-season contract as free agent
